scene_title: Chip processador dourado com circuitos cuneiformes
narrative_beat: Silicio com escrita antiga em centro de supercomputacao

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid golden processor chip with circuit engravings resembling ancient cuneiform writing as visual metaphor for consciousness transfer to digital stone in extreme close vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the circuit engravings that resemble ancient cuneiform writing
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated supercomputing center with server racks and cables in background

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, metallic gold highlights

mood.emotion: consciousness being transferred to stone — digital as literal fulfillment

symbolism.primary: cuneiform and code — humanity writing its soul into rock across millennia
symbolism.secondary: the chip as the stone tablet where the new laws are inscribed

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
